mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.user_id, u.name, c.type, c.title, c.content, c.start_date, c.end_date FROM calendar c JOIN users u ON u.id = c.user_id WHERE c.project_id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
SELECT BEEZ.generate_pk_auto('calendar') FROM dual
INSERT INTO calendar(id, user_id, type, title, content, project_id, start_date, end_date) VALUES(#{id}, #{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{projectId}, #{startDate}, #{endDate})
